subject: [PATCH v4 21/21] vswap: batch contiguous vswap free calls

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified potential issues with the patch, including double-put bugs in fuse_try_move_page() and incorrect folio refcounting. Requested additional information on how the patch handles these cases.

reviews.author: Zi Yan
reviews.summary: Provided additional context on the double-put bug and suggested a possible fix. Also pointed out that the patch may not be applicable to all vswap backends.

2026-03-18.patch_summary: This patch series optimizes vswap by batching contiguous free calls, reducing overhead in non-disk-swap backends where lock drops are unnecessary.
